message:
refactor(benches): migrate all benchmarks from tokio to asupersync compat runtime

All six benchmark files now use the frankenterm_core::runtime_compat
abstraction layer instead of direct tokio imports:
- compression_bypass: tokio::runtime → RuntimeBuilder, tokio::net → unix,
  tokio::spawn → task::spawn, tokio::io → runtime_compat::unix IO traits
- mux_client_ops: same runtime migration plus UnixStream/UnixListener
- mux_pool_scaling: runtime + task + unix abstraction
- pdu_pipelining: runtime migration
- socket_throughput: runtime + unix stream abstraction
- subscription_streaming: runtime + task + unix + timeout abstraction

This aligns benchmarks with the ongoing asupersync runtime migration
(matching the test suite migration in commit 2482469a) so the entire
crate can eventually drop its direct tokio dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
